name: morning-brief
command: senkani brief --for today --out ~/.senkani/briefs/$(date +%F).md && senkani notify --sink pushover --priority info --title "Morning brief" --body-file ~/.senkani/briefs/$(date +%F).md
description: Daily 06:30 brief of yesterday's session + today's hot files, written to ~/.senkani/briefs and pushed via Pushover.
